name: RichTextEditor
description: WYSIWYG editor wrapping TipTap with Lumeo styling.

api.name: RichTextEditor
api.description: WYSIWYG editor wrapping TipTap with Lumeo styling.

parameters.name: ToolbarMode
parameters.description: Legacy toolbar mode; superseded by Toolbar.

parameters.name: Toolbar
parameters.description: Toolbar density preset. Defaults to Standard.

parameters.name: MaxWordImportBytes
parameters.description: Maximum size, in bytes, of a Word document accepted by the in-browser import path. Defaults to 8 MB. Larger files are refused before being read into memory and surfaced to the user via WordImportError. Set explicitly when consumers expect large documents and the deployment can afford the memory.

parameters.name: OnImageRequested
parameters.description: Resolves a picked image into a URL (or data URI). Receives file metadata from JS; consumer is expected to upload the file out-of-band (e.g. via a paired InputFile) and return a final URL. If null, images fall back to base64.

parameters.name: OnAiAction
parameters.description: Selection-driven AI actions. Receives the action id and selected plain text; returns replacement HTML to be inserted in place of the selection.

parameters.name: OnWordImportRequested
parameters.description: Optional override for Word import. Receives the picked file payload (filename + bytes) and returns HTML to replace the editor content. When NOT set, the file is converted in-browser via WordImporter (Mammoth runs inside the WASM bundle), so the demo works on static hosting with no server. Set this when you want server-side conversion (better fidelity for complex docs).

enums.name: RichTextToolbarMode
enums.description: Legacy toolbar mode — kept so existing call sites compile.

mdSummary:
# RichTextEditor

WYSIWYG editor wrapping TipTap with Lumeo styling.

**Package:** `Lumeo.Editor` · **Category:** Forms/Specialized
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/rich-text-editor

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| RichTextEditor | FormField | `FormField.FormFieldContext?` | `` |  |
| RichTextEditor | Value | `string?` | `` |  |
| RichTextEditor | ValueChanged | `EventCallback<string?>` | `` |  |
| RichTextEditor | Placeholder | `string` | `"Start writing…"` |  |
| RichTextEditor | MinHeight | `int` | `180` |  |
| RichTextEditor | MaxHeight | `int?` | `` |  |
| RichTextEditor | Disabled | `bool` | `` |  |
| RichTextEditor | ReadOnly | `bool` | `` |  |
| RichTextEditor | Required | `bool` | `` |  |
| RichTextEditor | Invalid | `bool` | `` |  |
| RichTextEditor | ErrorText | `string?` | `` |  |
| RichTextEditor | HelperText | `string?` | `` |  |
| RichTextEditor | Label | `string?` | `` |  |
| RichTextEditor | Name | `string?` | `` |  |
| RichTextEditor | ToolbarMode | `RichTextToolbarMode?` | `` | Legacy toolbar mode; superseded by Toolbar. |
| RichTextEditor | Toolbar | `EditorToolbarPreset` | `EditorToolbarPreset.Standard` | Toolbar density preset. Defaults to Standard. |
| RichTextEditor | Triggers | `IReadOnlyList<EditorTrigger>?` | `` |  |
| RichTextEditor | EnableSlashCommand | `bool` | `true` |  |
| RichTextEditor | EnableTables | `bool` | `true` |  |
| RichTextEditor | EnableCodeBlock | `bool` | `true` |  |
| RichTextEditor | EnableImages | `bool` | `true` |  |
| RichTextEditor | EnableTaskList | `bool` | `true` |  |
| RichTextEditor | EnableMarkdownShortcuts | `bool` | `true` |  |
| RichTextEditor | EnableAiActions | `bool` | `` |  |
| RichTextEditor | EnableBubbleMenu | `bool` | `true` |  |
| RichTextEditor | EnableDragHandle | `bool` | `true` |  |
| RichTextEditor | MaxLength | `int?` | `` |  |
| RichTextEditor | AllowWordImport | `bool` | `` |  |
| RichTextEditor | MaxWordImportBytes | `long` | `8L * 1024L * 1024L` | Maximum size, in bytes, of a Word document accepted by the in-browser import path. Defaults to 8 MB. Larger files are refused before being read into memory and surfaced to the user via WordImportError. Set explicitly when consumers expect large documents and the deployment can afford the memory. |
| RichTextEditor | OnImageRequested | `Func<EditorImageRequest, ValueTask<string?>>?` | `` | Resolves a picked image into a URL (or data URI). Receives file metadata from JS; consumer is expected to upload the file out-of-band (e.g. via a paired InputFile) and return a final URL. If null, images fall back to base64. |
| RichTextEditor | OnAiAction | `Func<string, string, ValueTask<string?>>?` | `` | Selection-driven AI actions. Receives the action id and selected plain text; returns replacement HTML to be inserted in place of the selection. |
| RichTextEditor | OnWordImportRequested | `Func<WordImportPayload, ValueTask<string>>?` | `` | Optional override for Word import. Receives the picked file payload (filename + bytes) and returns HTML to replace the editor content. When NOT set, the file is converted in-browser via WordImporter (Mammoth runs inside the WASM bundle), so the demo works on static hosting with no server. Set this when you want server-side conversion (better fidelity for complex docs). |
| RichTextEditor | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| RichTextEditor | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| AiActionMenu | Actions | `IReadOnlyList<AiAction>?` | `` |  |
| AiActionMenu | OnAction | `EventCallback<AiAction>` | `` |  |
| AiActionMenu | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| AiActionMenu | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| BubbleMenu | EnableAiActions | `bool` | `` |  |
| BubbleMenu | OnCommand | `EventCallback<string>` | `` |  |
| BubbleMenu | OnAiMenuToggled | `EventCallback` | `` |  |
| BubbleMenu | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| BubbleMenu | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| EditorToolbar | Preset | `EditorToolbarPreset` | `EditorToolbarPreset.Standard` |  |
| EditorToolbar | Active | `Lumeo.Services.Interop.RichTextActiveState?` | `` |  |
| EditorToolbar | Disabled | `bool` | `` |  |
| EditorToolbar | AllowWordImport | `bool` | `` |  |
| EditorToolbar | EnableAiActions | `bool` | `` |  |
| EditorToolbar | OnCommand | `EventCallback<(string command, object? arg)>` | `` |  |
| EditorToolbar | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| EditorToolbar | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| TriggerDropdown | Id | `string?` | `` |  |
| TriggerDropdown | Items | `IReadOnlyList<TriggerItem>?` | `` |  |
| TriggerDropdown | SelectedIndex | `int` | `` |  |
| TriggerDropdown | ItemTemplate | `RenderFragment<TriggerItem>?` | `` |  |
| TriggerDropdown | OnPick | `EventCallback<TriggerItem>` | `` |  |
| TriggerDropdown | OnHover | `EventCallback<int>` | `` |  |
| TriggerDropdown | AriaLabel | `string` | `"Suggestions"` |  |
| TriggerDropdown | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| TriggerDropdown | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- `ItemTemplate` (TriggerDropdown) — RenderFragment slot

## Events
- `ValueChanged` (`EventCallback<string?>`)

## Sub-components
- `AiActionMenu`, `BubbleMenu`, `EditorToolbar`, `TriggerDropdown`

## Cascading values it expects
- `FormField` (`FormField.FormFieldContext?`)

## Services it injects
- `ComponentInteropService` (Services)

## Keyboard
- `Enter` — HandleLinkDialogKey handles Enter in RichTextEditor.razor
- `Escape` — HandleLinkDialogKey handles Escape in RichTextEditor.razor

## Example
```razor
<RichTextEditor />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-accent`, `--color-accent-foreground`, `--color-border`, `--color-card`, `--color-destructive`, `--color-foreground`, `--color-muted`, `--color-muted-foreground`, `--color-popover`, `--color-popover-foreground`, `--color-ring`, `--radius`
